evidence: The PDF source shows period followed by two newlines before [¶4]: '389.\n\n[¶4]'. In plain-text DB form, this becomes a space separator: '389. [¶4]'. The DB currently has no space ('389.[¶4]'), a clear whitespace transcription defect. The pattern is verified against all other paragraph transitions in the opinion, which consistently show '. [¶N]' spacing in the PDF.
